tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device_tool
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall address
edit "ATTACKER_7.0.14.1"
set subnet 7.0.14.1 255.255.255.255
next
end

config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "Block_ICMP_Attacker"
set srcintf "any"
set dstintf "any"
set srcaddr "ATTACKER_7.0.14.1"
set dstaddr "all"
set action deny
set schedule "always"
set service "PING"
set logtraffic all
next
end

show firewall policy | grep -f "Block_ICMP_Attacker" -n || show firewall policy"}

tool_calls.name: add_network_device
tool_calls.content: Successfully added and started a snort named SnortIPS2

tool_calls.name: link_network_devices
tool_calls.content: Successfully connected a link between device FortiGate7.0.14-1 and SnortIPS2
